title: Add seeded RNG support for reproducible simulations
description: Implement support for reproducible simulation runs by adding seeded random number generator support. Should allow setting a seed for deterministic behavior across simulation runs.
close_reason: Implemented in sim/simulation.py: Simulation gains seed param, rng property (random.Random), seed property, reseed(). Same seed -> identical sequence. Added LossRule chaos rule (probabilistic drop drawing from an injected rng) for reproducible random chaos. 11 tests incl. reproducibility + LossRule wired to sim.rng. ruff clean.
